summary: The evolution scan identifies critical performance risks related to synchronous I/O and maintainability issues stemming from monolithic code structures. Prioritizing the migration of I/O operations will stabilize runtime performance, while modularizing the frontend will reduce future development friction.
newTechnologiesDiscovered: Single Responsibility Principle (SRP) in Monolithic Architectures
weaknessesIdentified: Slow components: Event loop starvation caused by synchronous File System calls.
Architectural limitations: High technical debt due to 'God Object' components.
possibleImprovements: Blocking the Node.js event loop during registry operations.
Maintenance difficulty of main UI file.
